body.title: CLOSED: Auto-file or surface audit pass-2 severity-high findings as tickets
body.result: Built audit_findings_to_tickets.py with AuditFinding dataclass + FindingMatcher deduplication, integrated into day-close-audit skill at Step 19.5. Parses Pass 2 audit output for severity-high findings and surfaces new ones not yet ticketed. 18 tests pass.
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
Build a mechanism so audit findings don't sit dead in markdown. Parse lab/design_docs/audit_2026/pass2_output/*.md for severity-high gaps; diff against existing tickets; file the missing ones OR surface them on the next slate for decision. Motivated by: pass-2 Gap 1 (SQLite fallback, severity high) sat unaddressed for weeks until Akien noticed SQLite live in the slow-query log today.

**Affected files:** new `lab/claudecode/audit_findings_to_tickets.py`. Wire into /day-close skill step (runs the scan, surfaces deltas). Possibly add palace rule `theigors/rules/audit-findings-auto-file`.
**Design rules:** no-sqlite: scans markdown + uses cc_queue (Postgres-backed). No persistence, no SQLite. oop-first: AuditFinding dataclass + FindingMatcher function is likely right — growing state suggests class. Justify shape at sprint time. docs-in-code: script top-of-file docstring names the audit paths scanned + match strategy + output format. test-plan-or-why-not: applies.
**Scope boundary:** IN — parse pass-2 findings, match against queue, file OR surface missing severity-high. OUT — parsing all severities (stay narrow), restructuring audit markdown format, retroactive file-all-historical-findings sweep.
**Test plan:** Unit test — fixture audit markdown with 3 findings (2 HIGH, 1 MEDIUM), assert only 2 HIGH become tickets. Integration — run against real pass2_output/ and assert the matcher would have filed Gap 1 (SQLite fallback) if the mechanism existed before today.
body.approved_plan: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
